__fixture__.name: start_center_offline_managed
__fixture__.scenario: The user reopens on a device whose network is down while a managed-cloud workspace is the most recent entry. Offline-state disclosure renders as a blocking banner in the disclosure_band zone above primary_work_resume because the most recent row prefers a remote route; the banner cites resolution_hooks reconnect_required and continue_in_restricted_mode so the user sees the truthful envelope and the remedy verb. freshness_class = stale_offline on the banner reflects that the managed-cloud authority was last validated while online. account_opt_in_posture = required_for_this_row because the managed-cloud row needs reauth to proceed; the Start Center still preserves Open folder / Clone repository as optional_local_path_available in primary_work_resume. Composes with docs/ux/entry_restore_truth_audit.md §6.8 startup_state:offline_startup.

presentation_label: You are offline. Managed-cloud workspace is unreachable.
presentation_subtitle: Reconnect to resume the managed workspace, or continue in restricted mode with local-only work.
